title: AI-SDLC BacklogTask
description: Frontmatter schema for backlog task markdown files (backlog/tasks/*.md and backlog/completed/*.md). All fields not listed here are permitted (additionalProperties not enforced at this schema level — YAML round-trips must preserve unknown keys per the backlog-frontmatter.ts contract). The specRef field is optional: native/operator-authored tasks omit it; tasks imported via the spec-kit bridge (RFC-0036 Phase 4, cli-import-spec) carry it.

id.description: Backlog task identifier, e.g. 'AISDLC-444'. Case-insensitive convention; internal tooling normalises to lowercase.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Common values: 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done'. Exact set is adopter-configured in backlog/config.yml.

created_date.description: ISO date or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM' timestamp the task was created.

updated_date.description: ISO date or 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM' timestamp of the last edit. Stamped automatically by applyTaskEdit().

dependencies.description: Optional list of upstream task IDs this task depends on.

references.description: Optional list of RFC paths or other reference strings. Checked by the backlog-drift gate.

permittedExternalPaths.description: Optional allowlist of sibling-repo paths the developer subagent may write to (PreToolUse hook contract).

dispatchable.description: When false, the autonomous orchestrator never dispatches a developer subagent for this task (AISDLC-243). Default true when omitted.

dispatchableReason.description: Human-readable advisory explaining why dispatchable:false was set.

blocked.description: Optional hold on the task. Presence bypasses the upstream-OQ gate and the DoR ingress workflow gate.

reason.description: Explanation of why the task is blocked and when it can unblock.

specRef.description: Back-reference to the upstream spec artifact that produced this task (RFC-0036 §9.1). Optional: omitted for native/operator-authored tasks; present for tasks imported via cli-import-spec. The 'source' field is required; all other fields are optional but expected for spec-kit imports.

source.description: Which upstream tool produced the task.

featureId.description: Slug identifying the spec-kit feature directory (e.g. 'auth-feature').

taskId.description: Upstream task identifier within the artifact (e.g. 'T-007').

artifactPath.description: Repo-relative or absolute path to the upstream spec artifact (e.g. '.specify/specs/auth-feature/tasks.md'). The drift gate performs a file-existence check on this path and emits an info-level warning when the file is absent.

contractsPath.description: Optional path to the upstream API/contract artifact (e.g. '.specify/specs/auth-feature/contracts/auth-api.yaml').

importedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the task was imported from the upstream artifact.
